//

// DROP Picture functionality
(function () {
  var canvas_container = document.getElementById('drawingtool');
  canvas_container.addEventListener('drop', function (e) {

    e = e || window.event;
    if (e.preventDefault) {
      e.preventDefault();
    }

    var pointer = drawingTool.canvas.getPointer(e);
    var posX = pointer.x;
    var posY = pointer.y;

    var dt = e.dataTransfer;
    var files = dt.files;
    for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
      var file = files[i];

      if (file.type != "application/pdf") {
        console.log(file.name, "is not a pdf file, normal drag and drop functionality");

        var reader = new FileReader();

        //attach event handlers here...
        reader.onload = function (e) {
          var img = new Image();
          img.src = e.target.result;
          //console.log(JSON.stringify(img.src));
          fabric.Image.fromURL(img.src, function (img) {
            var widthRatio = FMCONST.canvas.width / img.width;
            var heightRatio = FMCONST.canvas.height / img.height;
            var minRatio = Math.min(widthRatio, heightRatio);
            if (minRatio < 1) {
              img.set({
                width: img.width * minRatio,
                height: img.height * minRatio
              });
            }
            posX = posX - img.width / 2;
            posY = posY - img.height / 2;
            img.set({ left: posX, top: posY });
            drawingTool.canvas.add(img);
            drawingTool.pushToHistory()
            drawingTool.chooseTool('select');
          });
        }
        reader.readAsDataURL(file);

      } else {

        console.log(file.name, "oh no, it is a PDF!")

        var fileReader = new FileReader();

        fileReader.onload = function () {
          var typedarray = new Uint8Array(this.result);

          pdfjsLib.GlobalWorkerOptions.workerSrc = pdfjsworker;

          //
          // Asynchronous load PDF
          //
          var loadingTask = pdfjsLib.getDocument({
            data: typedarray,
            // Try to export JPEG images directly if they don't need any further processing.
            nativeImageDecoderSupport: 1
          });
          loadingTask.promise
            .then(function (pdf) {
              //
              // Fetch the first page
              //
              pdf.getPage(1).then(function (page) {

                //
                // Prepare canvas using PDF page dimensions
                //
                var viewport = page.getViewport({ scale: 2.0 });
                var canvasEl = document.getElementById('pdfcanvas');
                canvasEl.style.visibility = 'hidden';
                canvasEl.height = viewport.height;
                canvasEl.width = viewport.width;

                //
                // Render PDF page into canvas context
                //
                var renderContext = {
                  canvasContext: canvasEl.getContext('2d'),
                  viewport: viewport,
                };

                var renderTask = page.render(renderContext);

                renderTask.promise
                  .then(function () {
                    var bg = canvasEl.toDataURL("image/png");
                    canvasEl.height = 0;
                    canvasEl.width = 0;
                    fabric.Image.fromURL(bg, function (img) {
                      var widthRatio = FMCONST.canvas.width / img.width;
                      var heightRatio = FMCONST.canvas.height / img.height;
                      var minRatio = Math.min(widthRatio, heightRatio);
                      if (minRatio < 1) {
                        img.set({
                          width: img.width * minRatio,
                          height: img.height * minRatio
                        });
                      }
                      posX = posX - img.width / 2;
                      posY = posY - img.height / 2;
                      img.set({ left: posX, top: posY });
                      drawingTool.canvas.add(img);
                      drawingTool.pushToHistory()
                      drawingTool.chooseTool('select');
                    });
                  });

              });
            });
        };
        fileReader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
      }



    }


    return false;
  });
  canvas_container.addEventListener('dragover', cancel);
  canvas_container.addEventListener('dragenter', cancel);
  function cancel(e) {
    if (e.preventDefault) { e.preventDefault(); }
    return false;
  }

})();


//Fit canvas when loading webpage is ready
$(document).ready(function() {
  scaleWindow();
  // Load background if one given...
  if ( **isBackground** ){
    fabric.Image.fromURL("**backgroundURL**", function(img) {
      ratioBackgroundMin = Math.min (drawingTool.canvas.width / img.width,drawingTool.canvas.height / img.height);
      posXbackground = drawingTool.canvas.width/2 - img.width* ratioBackgroundMin / 2;
      posYbackground = drawingTool.canvas.height/2 - img.height* ratioBackgroundMin / 2;
      console.log ( ratioBackgroundMin );
      drawingTool.canvas.setBackgroundImage(img, function(img) {
        drawingTool.canvas.renderAll();
        },
        {
            width: img.width * ratioBackgroundMin,
            height: img.height * ratioBackgroundMin,
            left: posXbackground,
            top: posYbackground
        }
      );
    });
  }
});

//Resize when browser gets bigger/smaller
$( window ).resize(function() {
  scaleWindow();
});

function scaleWindow(){
    storeRatio();
    refreshElementRects();
    document.body.style.transform = 'scale(' + FMCONST.ratio + ')';
    document.body.style.webkitTransform = 'scale(' + FMCONST.ratio + ')';
    colorPicker.style.transform = 'scale(' + 1 / FMCONST.ratio * FMCONST.ratioCol + ')';
    colorPicker.style.webkitTransform = 'scale(' + 1 / FMCONST.ratio * FMCONST.ratioCol  + ')';
    console.log(FMCONST.ratio,FMCONST.ratioCol);
}


// ColorPicker

var addSwatch = document.getElementById('add-swatch');
var getColor = document.getElementById('get-color');
var modeToggle = document.getElementById('mode-toggle');
var swatches = document.getElementsByClassName('default-swatches')[0];
var colorIndicator = document.getElementById('color-indicator');
var userSwatches = document.getElementById('user-swatches');
var showHide = document.getElementById('btn-showhide');
var colorPicker = document.getElementById('colorpicker');

var spectrumCanvas = document.getElementById('spectrum-canvas');
var spectrumCtx = spectrumCanvas.getContext('2d');
var spectrumCursor = document.getElementById('spectrum-cursor'); 
var spectrumRect = spectrumCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();

var hueCanvas = document.getElementById('hue-canvas');
var hueCtx = hueCanvas.getContext('2d');
var hueCursor = document.getElementById('hue-cursor'); 
var hueRect = hueCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();

var currentColor = '';
var currentType = '';
var hue = 0;
var saturation = 1;
var lightness = .5;
var defaultSwatchesArray = [
	'rgba(0,0,0,0)', 
	'#FFFFFF', 
	'#B3B3B3', 
	'#676767', 
	'#343434', 
	'#000000', 
	'#e01717', 
	'#9216df', 
	'#1d3ed4', 
	'#1ec14b', 
	'#d6de24', 
	'#e76509'
];

var userSwatchesArray = [];

//Load existing userSwatches if any...
if(metadata !=='' && typeof JSON.parse(metadata).userSwatches !== 'undefined'){
  userSwatchesArray = JSON.parse(metadata).userSwatches;
} else {
  userSwatchesArray = [
	'#bffffe',
	'#bbd5ec'
  ];
}

var rgbFields = document.getElementById('rgb-fields');
var hexField = document.getElementById('hex-field');

var red = document.getElementById('red');
var blue = document.getElementById('blue');
var green = document.getElementById('green');
var hex = document.getElementById('hex'); 

function ColorPicker(){
	this.addDefaultSwatches();
	this.addUserSwatches();
	createShadeSpectrum();
	createHueSpectrum();
  colorToPos();
};

ColorPicker.prototype.defaultSwatches = defaultSwatchesArray ;

ColorPicker.prototype.userSwatches = userSwatchesArray ;

function createSwatch(target, color){
	var swatch = document.createElement('div');
	swatch.classList.add('swatch');
	if(color == 'rgba(0,0,0,0)' ){
		swatch.setAttribute('title', 'transparent');
		swatch.style.overflow = 'hidden';
		var line = document.createElement('span');
		line.innerText = "|";
		line.style.color = "#ca1c1c";
		line.style.fontSize = "60px";
		line.style.display = "block";
		line.style.overflow = "hidden";
		line.style.transform = "rotate(-135deg)";
		line.style.transformOrigin = "6px 22px";
		line.style.padding = "0";
		line.style.margin = "0";
		swatch.appendChild (line);
    swatch.addEventListener('click', function(){
		  var color = tinycolor("rgba(0,0,0,0)");     
		  colorToPos(color);
		  setColorValues(color);	
      saveColor();
    });
    swatch.ontouchstart = function(e){
      e.preventDefault;
		  var color = tinycolor("rgba(0,0,0,0)");     
		  colorToPos(color);
		  setColorValues(color);	
      saveColor();
    }
  }else{
		swatch.style.backgroundColor = tinycolor(color).toHexString();
		swatch.setAttribute('title', color);
    swatch.onclick = function(){
		  var color = tinycolor(this.style.backgroundColor);     
		  colorToPos(color);
		  setColorValues(color);
      saveColor();
	  }
    swatch.ontouchstart = function(e){
      e.preventDefault;
		  var color = tinycolor(this.style.backgroundColor);     
		  colorToPos(color);
		  setColorValues(color);
      saveColor();
	  }
	}
	target.appendChild(swatch);
	refreshElementRects();
};

ColorPicker.prototype.addDefaultSwatches = function() {
	for(var i = 0; i < this.defaultSwatches.length; ++i){
		createSwatch(swatches, this.defaultSwatches[i]);
	} 
}

ColorPicker.prototype.addUserSwatches = function() {
	for(var i = 0; i < this.userSwatches.length; ++i){
		createSwatch(userSwatches, this.userSwatches[i]);
	} 
}

function refreshElementRects(){
	spectrumRect = spectrumCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
	hueRect = hueCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
}

function createShadeSpectrum(color) {
	canvas = spectrumCanvas;
	ctx = spectrumCtx;
	ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

	if(!color) color = '#f00';
	ctx.fillStyle = color;
	ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

	var whiteGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, canvas.width, 0);
	whiteGradient.addColorStop(0, "#fff");
	whiteGradient.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
	ctx.fillStyle = whiteGradient;
	ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

	var blackGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
	blackGradient.addColorStop(0, "transparent");
	blackGradient.addColorStop(1, "#000");
	ctx.fillStyle = blackGradient;
	ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

	canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){
		startGetSpectrumColor(e);
	});
	canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e){
		startGetSpectrumColor(e);
	});
};

function createHueSpectrum() {
	var canvas = hueCanvas;
	var ctx = hueCtx;
	var hueGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
	hueGradient.addColorStop(0.00, "hsl(0,100%,50%)");
	hueGradient.addColorStop(0.17, "hsl(298.8, 100%, 50%)");
	hueGradient.addColorStop(0.33, "hsl(241.2, 100%, 50%)");
	hueGradient.addColorStop(0.50, "hsl(180, 100%, 50%)");
	hueGradient.addColorStop(0.67, "hsl(118.8, 100%, 50%)");
	hueGradient.addColorStop(0.83, "hsl(61.2,100%,50%)");
	hueGradient.addColorStop(1.00, "hsl(360,100%,50%)");
	ctx.fillStyle = hueGradient;
	ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
	canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){
		startGetHueColor(e);
	});
	canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e){
		startGetHueColor(e);
	});
};

function colorToHue(color){
	var color = tinycolor(color);
	var hueString = tinycolor('hsl '+ color.toHsl().h + ' 1 .5').toHslString();
	return hueString;
};

function colorToPos(color){
	var color = tinycolor(color);
	var hsl = color.toHsl();
	hue = hsl.h;
	var hsv = color.toHsv();
	var x = spectrumRect.width * hsv.s / FMCONST.ratioCol ;
	var y = spectrumRect.height * (1 - hsv.v)/ FMCONST.ratioCol  ;
	var hueY = ( hueRect.height - ((hue / 360) * hueRect.height) )/ FMCONST.ratioCol  ;
	updateSpectrumCursor(x,y);
	updateHueCursor(hueY);
	setCurrentColor(color);
	createShadeSpectrum(colorToHue(color));   
};

function setColorValues(color){  
	//convert to tinycolor object
	var color = tinycolor(color);
	var rgbValues = color.toRgb();
	var hexValue = color.toHex();
	//set inputs
	red.value = rgbValues.r;
	green.value = rgbValues.g;
	blue.value = rgbValues.b;
	hex.value = hexValue;
};

function setCurrentColor(color){
	color = tinycolor(color);
	currentColor = color;
	colorIndicator.style.backgroundColor = color.toHexString();
	getColor.style.backgroundColor = color.toHexString(); 
	if ( color.isLight() ){
		getColor.style.color = '#333'
	} else {
		getColor.style.color = '#bbb'
	}
	spectrumCursor.style.backgroundColor = color.toHexString(); 
	hueCursor.style.backgroundColor = 'hsl('+ color.toHsl().h +', 100%, 50%)';
};

function updateHueCursor(y){
	hueCursor.style.top = y + 'px';
}

function updateSpectrumCursor(x, y){
	//assign position
	spectrumCursor.style.left = x-15 + 'px';
	spectrumCursor.style.top = y-15 + 'px';  
};

var startGetSpectrumColor = function(e) {
	getSpectrumColor(e);
	spectrumCursor.classList.add('dragging');
	window.addEventListener('mousemove', getSpectrumColor);
	window.addEventListener('touchmove', getSpectrumColor);
	window.addEventListener('mouseup', endGetSpectrumColor);
	window.addEventListener('touchend', endGetSpectrumColor);
};

function getSpectrumColor(e) {
	// got some help here - http://stackoverflow.com/questions/23520909/get-hsl-value-given-x-y-and-hue
	e.preventDefault();
	//get x/y coordinates
	var x = (e.pageX - spectrumRect.left) / FMCONST.ratioCol;
	var y = (e.pageY - spectrumRect.top ) / FMCONST.ratioCol;
	//constrain x max
	if(x > (spectrumRect.width/ FMCONST.ratioCol)){ x = spectrumRect.width/ FMCONST.ratioCol}
	if(x < 0){ x = 0}
	if(y > (spectrumRect.height/ FMCONST.ratioCol)){ y = spectrumRect.height/ FMCONST.ratioCol}
	if(y < 0){ y = .1}  
	//convert between hsv and hsl
	var xRatio = Math.floor ( x / spectrumRect.width * 100* FMCONST.ratioCol * 100)/100;
	var yRatio = Math.floor ( y / spectrumRect.height * 100* FMCONST.ratioCol*100)/100; 
	var hsvValue = 1 - (yRatio / 100);
	var hsvSaturation = xRatio / 100;
	lightness = (hsvValue / 2) * (2 - hsvSaturation);
	saturation = (hsvValue * hsvSaturation) / (1 - Math.abs(2 * lightness - 1));
	var color = tinycolor('hsl ' + hue + ' ' + saturation + ' ' + lightness);
	setCurrentColor(color);  
	setColorValues(color);
	updateSpectrumCursor(x,y);
};

function endGetSpectrumColor(e){
	spectrumCursor.classList.remove('dragging');
	window.removeEventListener('mousemove', getSpectrumColor);
	window.removeEventListener('touchmove', getSpectrumColor);
};

function startGetHueColor(e) {
	getHueColor(e);
	hueCursor.classList.add('dragging');
	window.addEventListener('mousemove', getHueColor);
	window.addEventListener('touchmove', getHueColor);
	window.addEventListener('mouseup', endGetHueColor);
	window.addEventListener('touchend', endGetHueColor);
};

function getHueColor(e){
	e.preventDefault();
	var y = (e.pageY - hueRect.top) / FMCONST.ratioCol;
	if (y > (hueRect.height) / FMCONST.ratioCol ) { y = ( hueRect.height ) / FMCONST.ratioCol };
	if (y < 0){ y = 0};  
	var percent = Math.floor(y / hueRect.height * FMCONST.ratioCol * 100)/100;
	hue = 360 - (360 * percent);
	var hueColor = tinycolor('hsl '+ hue + ' 1 .5').toHslString();
	var color = tinycolor('hsl '+ hue + ' ' + saturation + ' ' + lightness).toHslString();
	createShadeSpectrum(hueColor);
	updateHueCursor(y, hueColor)
	setCurrentColor(color);
	setColorValues(color);
};

function endGetHueColor(e){
	hueCursor.classList.remove('dragging');
	window.removeEventListener('mousemove', getHueColor);
	window.removeEventListener('touchmove', getHueColor);
};

function showHidePicker(color){  
	if ( colorPicker.style.visibility == 'visible' ){
		colorPicker.style.visibility = 'hidden';
	}else{
    scaleWindow();
		colorToPos ( color );
    setCurrentColor(color);
    setColorValues(color);
		colorPicker.style.visibility = 'visible';
  }
};

// Add event listeners
red.addEventListener('change', function(){
		var color = tinycolor('rgb ' + red.value + ' ' + green.value + ' ' + blue.value );
		colorToPos(color);
});

green.addEventListener('change', function(){
		var color = tinycolor('rgb ' + red.value + ' ' + green.value + ' ' + blue.value );
		colorToPos(color);
});

blue.addEventListener('change', function(){
		var color = tinycolor('rgb ' + red.value + ' ' + green.value + ' ' + blue.value );
		colorToPos(color);
});

hex.addEventListener('change', function(){
		var color = tinycolor('#' + hex.value  );
		colorToPos(color);
});

var saveColor = function(){  
  if( colorType == "strokeColors"){
    if ( currentColor._a == 0 ){
      drawingTool.setStrokeColor("");
    }else{
      drawingTool.setStrokeColor(currentColor.toHexString());
    }
  } else if (colorType == "fillColors" ){
    if ( currentColor._a == 0 ){
      drawingTool.setFillColor("");
    }else{
      drawingTool.setFillColor(currentColor.toHexString())
    }
  }
  showHidePicker();
};

addSwatch.addEventListener('click', function(){  
  createSwatch(userSwatches, currentColor);
  userSwatchesArray.push(currentColor.toHexString());
});
addSwatch.addEventListener('touchstart', function(){  
  createSwatch(userSwatches, currentColor);
  userSwatchesArray.push(currentColor.toHexString());
});

getColor.addEventListener('click', saveColor );
getColor.addEventListener('touchstart', saveColor );

modeToggle.addEventListener('click', function(){
	if(rgbFields.classList.contains('active') ? rgbFields.classList.remove('active') : rgbFields.classList.add('active'));
	if(hexField.classList.contains('active') ? hexField.classList.remove('active') : hexField.classList.add('active'));
});
modeToggle.addEventListener('touchstart', function(){
	if(rgbFields.classList.contains('active') ? rgbFields.classList.remove('active') : rgbFields.classList.add('active'));
	if(hexField.classList.contains('active') ? hexField.classList.remove('active') : hexField.classList.add('active'));
});


new ColorPicker();

</script>

  </body>
</html>
